title: Craftable Mob Egg
description: You can now create a mob farm easily! Mabuhay!!!
body:
### You can now Craft Mob Eggs and a Mob Spawner!

### Craftable Eggs list

+ Cow 
+ Sheep
+ Pig
+ Zombie
+ Skeleton
+ Spider
+ Creeper
+ Endermen
+ Piglin
+ Zombified Piglin
+ Blaze

Check the gallery for the Crafting recipes

Make a Mob Farm now!!!
